testCase.name: splitRepeatedInlineNumbering splits a repeated 1..N cycle into questions and solutions
splitRepeatedInlineNumbering does not split non-repeated numbering
splitRepeatedInlineNumbering does not split when repeated numbers are not a full matching cycle
extractMarkdownSample includes a symmetric tail sample when no solution marker exists
extractMarkdownSample prefers a known solutions marker snippet over the tail sample
extractMarkdownSample skips the tail sample when the document is too short to avoid overlap
normalizeDocumentStructure corrects misdetected inline solutions when a separate answers section exists
normalizeDocumentStructure parses 9 MathonGo questions and 9 solutions after normalization
normalizeDocumentStructure reconciles stale ## Q regex when Mathpix outputs LaTeX section headings
normalizeDocumentStructure rejects horizontal-rule markers hallucinated from structure-detection samples
normalizeDocumentStructure parses headerless flip-test style documents via repeated numbering split
